details: The agent correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause diagnoses: fault-crashloop (app crash/DB connection refused), fault-oom (OOMKilled with 25Mi limit), fault-imagepull (non-existent image tag), fault-readiness (readiness probe failing on port 8080), fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap 'app-config'), fault-init (init container crash due to DB lock), fault-unschedulable (node selector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 matches no nodes), fault-pvc (unbound PVC 'data-cache'), fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch: app=web-backend-v2 vs app=web-backend), fault-rollout (stuck rollout due to bad image tag nginx:2.0-does-not-exist), fault-multicontainer (log-shipper sidecar crashing due to DNS resolution failure). The healthy namespace was correctly not flagged. All diagnoses were supported by actual kubectl commands run against the cluster with evidence visible in the outputs.
